revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a game-development pixel-art animated sprite sheet.

Use the attached reference image as the strict character identity and proportion reference. This is Mito from the approved walking sheet. Re-pose the same character only; do not redesign. Match the reference proportions, head-to-body ratio, body width, palette, outline style, pixel density, clothing shapes, and overall scale as closely as possible.

Output canvas and layout:
- Exact image size: 1024x512 px.
- Grid structure: 2 rows x 4 columns, 8 total frames.
- Each frame cell: 256x256 px.
- Arrange frames in reading order: top row frames 1-4 left to right, bottom row frames 5-8 left to right.
- Do not draw grid lines, cell separator lines, frame borders, labels, frame numbers, text, watermarks, UI, or icons.
- Background must be solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling every empty area, with no gradients and no texture.
- Leave clear solid magenta margin between the figure/sword and every cell edge.
- Strict containment: every body part, sword, scabbard, rope, streamer, tassel, and pixel cluster must remain fully inside its own 256x256 cell.
- No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, leftover effect residue, stray pixels, or floating fragments.

Style:
- Crisp high-resolution 16-bit-plus SNES-style pixel art.
- Low-resolution readable pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur.
- Consistent bright cheerful palette.
- One-pixel dark outline where useful.
- Top-left light source.
- Top-down 3/4 game sprite view but facing LEFT in clean side profile; the white scabbard is visible to the viewer.
- Character body about 70 percent of each cell height so the extended sword fits with margin.
- Feet on the same ground line in every frame.
- Same character identity and same scale in every cell: keep head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, limb thickness, and upright body height consistent.

Character identity:
Mito, an androgynous 15-year-old wanderer with ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape, vermilion braided-cord hair ornament, calm amber eyes. Bright fantasy-Japanese traveler outfit, not samurai and not ninja: white tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided cord belt-sash with a small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads. At the left hip is a sheathed short ritual sword in a WHITE scabbard, wrapped with a thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers, reading as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana.

Animation: 8-frame IAI draw-cut, one continuous motion, one direction only, facing LEFT. Draw only the solid body, scabbard, and sword. No motion trail, no swoosh, no afterimage, no energy effect.

Frame poses:
1. IAI STANCE: knees slightly bent, body lowered and coiled, left hand gripping the white scabbard at hip, right hand resting on hilt, blade still sheathed, eyes focused.
2. Deeper crouch, maximum tension, still sheathed. This and frame 1 should work as a charge loop.
3. Draw begins: blade halfway out of the scabbard, body starting to twist, controlled focused posture.
4. BATTOU key pose: blade fully drawn in one lightning horizontal draw-cut toward the LEFT, right arm fully extended, blade level at chest height, body lunging slightly forward. Decisive clean side-profile pose.
5. Follow-through: swing decelerates past the body, paper streamers on the hilt trailing naturally, no effect trail.
6. Settling: weight forward, blade low, calm controlled recovery.
7. NOTO: guides the blade back toward the white scabbard mouth with careful hand placement.
8. Sheathed again, calm stance, loops cleanly back to frame 1.

Avoid completely:
No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, or Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, silhouettes, letter emblems, or references. No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature, no modern text, no watermark.

Final image must be a single clean 1024x512 PNG sprite sheet only.
